output.code:
# Open the file and read raw content
path = "/mnt/data/file-So4mimG2XRKCwdEoNSLBZ7-text_to_analyse.txt"
raw = open(path, 'rb').read().decode('utf-8')
raw

# Find indices of the first quoted block
s = raw
first_quote_start = s.find('"')
first_quote_end = s.find('"', first_quote_start+1)
first_span = s[first_quote_start+1:first_quote_end]
first_quote_start, first_quote_end, first_span

second_start = raw.find('"', first_quote_end+1)
second_end = raw.find('"', second_start+1)
second_span = raw[second_start+1:second_end]
second_start, second_end, second_span[:30], len(second_span)

third_start = raw.find('"', second_end+1)
third_end = raw.find('"', third_start+1)
third_span = raw[third_start+1:third_end]
third_start, third_end, third_span[:30], len(third_span)

phrase = first_span
positions = []
start=0
while True:
    idx = raw.find(phrase, start)
    if idx==-1: break
    positions.append(idx)
    start = idx+1
positions

for idx in positions:
    print(idx, raw[max(0,idx-80):idx+len(phrase)+80])

spans = []

# First phrase occurrences
for idx in positions:
    spans.append({"span_start": idx, "span_end": idx+len(phrase), "span_text": phrase, "citation_type": "Aya"})

# Second span single occurrence
idx2 = second_start+1
spans.append({"span_start": idx2, "span_end": idx2+len(second_span), "span_text": second_span, "citation_type": "Aya"})

# Third span occurrence
idx3 = third_start+1
spans.append({"span_start": idx3, "span_end": idx3+len(third_span), "span_text": third_span, "citation_type": "Aya"})

spans

spans_sorted = sorted(spans, key=lambda x: x['span_start'])
spans_sorted

content.text: {"citations":[{"span_start":64,"span_end":143,"span_text":"ءَأَنتَ \u000cقُلۡتَ \u000cلِلنَّاسِ ٱتَّخِذُونِي وَأُمِّيَ إِلَٰهَيۡنِ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ","citation_type":"Aya"},{"span_start":176,"span_end":405,"span_text":"مَا قُلْتُ لَهُمْ إِلَّا مَا أَمَرْتَنِي بِهِ أَنِ اعْبُدُوا اللَّهَ رَبِّي وَرَبَّكُمْ وَكُنتُ عَلَيْهِمْ شَهِيدًا مَا دُمْتُ فِيهِمْ فَلَمَّا تَوَفَّيْتَنِي كُنتَ أَنْتَ الرَّقِيبَ عَلَيْهِمْ وَأَنْتَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ شَهِيدٌ","citation_type":"Aya"},{"span_start":634,"span_end":1242,"span_text":"وَكَذَلِكَ نُرِي إِبْرَاهِيمَ مَلَكُوتَ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَالأَرْضِ وَلِيَكُونَ مِنَ الْمُوقِنِينَ * فَلَمَّا جَنَّ عَلَيْهِ اللَّيْلُ رَأَى كَوْكَبًا قَالَ هَذَا رَبِّي فَلَمَّا أَفَلَ قَالَ لَا أُحِبُّ الْآفِلِينَ * فَلَمَّا رَأَى الْقَمَرَ بَاغِرًا قَالَ هَذَا رَبِّي فَلَمَّا أَفَلَ قَالَ لَئِن لَّمْ يَهْدِنِي رَبِّي لَأَكُونَنَّ مِنَ الْقَوْمِ الضَّالِّينَ * فَلَمَّا رَأَى الشَّمْسَ بَاغِرًا قَالَ هَذَا رَبِّي هَذَا أَكْبَرُ فَلَمَّا أَفَلَتْ قَالَ يَا قَوْمِ إِنِّي بَرِيءٌ مِّمَّا تُشْرِكُونَ * إِنِّي وَجَّهْتُ وَجْهِي لِلَّذِي فَطَرَ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَالأَرْضَ حَنِيفًا وَمَا أَنَا مِنَ الْمُشْرِكِينَ","citation_type":"Aya"},{"span_start":2230,"span_end":2309,"span_text":"ءَأَنتَ \u000cقُلۡتَ \u000cلِلنَّاسِ ٱتَّخِذُونِي وَأُمِّيَ إِلَٰهَيۡنِ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ","citation_type":"Aya"},{"span_start":2393,"span_end":2472,"span_text":"ءَأَنتَ \u000cقُلۡتَ \u000cلِلنَّاسِ ٱتَّخِذُونِي وَأُمِّيَ إِلَٰهَيۡنِ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ","citation_type":"Aya"},{"span_start":3078,"span_end":3157,"span_text":"ءَأَنتَ \u000cقُلۡتَ \u000cلِلنَّاسِ ٱتَّخِذُونِي وَأُمِّيَ إِلَٰهَيۡنِ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ","citation_type":"Aya"},{"span_start":3869,"span_end":3948,"span_text":"ءَأَنتَ \u000cقُلۡتَ \u000cلِلنَّاسِ ٱتَّخِذُونِي وَأُمِّيَ إِلَٰهَيۡنِ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ","citation_type":"Aya"}]}
